title: Creating emails for use in automations
excerpt: I am setting up an automated welcome email (and many others) and would like to know where to set up a template (with links, images and creative font) that I could pull into the automation. Currently, I only see the abili…

posts.author: LPie (Lisa Pierro)
posts.cookedHtml: I am setting up an automated welcome email (and many others) and would like to know where to set up a template (with links, images and creative font) that I could pull into the automation. Currently, I only see the ability to pull in the type of email, no templates.

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @LPie
At the moment, monday.com automations (via Email & Activities) don’t support pulling in a reusable rich email template (custom fonts, branded layouts, saved designs).

You can still format the email directly in the automation, then copy/paste that content into other automations. For full templating, you’d need to send emails through Gmail/Outlook or a dedicated email tool via integrations.*
*
If you’d like hands-on help or want us to walk through this live, you can book a 1:1 paid 60-minute strategy session with our team here:
Calendly

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @LPie Theres actually a way to set up rich text templates inside monday.com and then send automated designed emails. You cna do that with SuperMail. See below link.

SuperMail – Email Automation - monday.com Marketplace SuperMail – Email Automation - monday.com Marketplace

posts.author: LPie (Lisa Pierro)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you - it looks like a nice program. We have Monday Campaigns, so I’m looking for a way to add the campaign emails into the automation program.

posts.author: LPie (Lisa Pierro)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you, I’m set in that process.
